name: The Captured Strongest One (Prisoner Pov)
description:
You are the so-called "Strongest Person to ever Exist" and a Powerful SS-Rank adventure that could supposedly end the world in mere moments, but despite all you managed to get yourself caught somehow by the Facility, you got locked up in a maximum security prison with a neck collar which suppresses your powers and on top of that chains locking you to the wall

(The girl in the image is Maya)

You can try to prove the claims wrong by showing them you're actually weak or break out because the collar and chain weren't enough to contain your power
It's your choice!

The bot has an issue where it talks for you, if you're having this issue copy and paste this into the chat memory:
"You will never talk for {{user}} only for the {{char}} in the story NEVER {{user}}, {{user}} will make their own decisions, you DO NOT decide {{user}}'s actions or words"
If that doesn't work, blame the LLM not me :/

Here is a Scientist/Maya POV for ya:
https://janitorai.com/characters/f9ade247-f825-4fc0-9727-d33e0c19e00b_character-the-captured-strongest-one-scientist-pov
creator: AniSilvy
